author: DominicVainMod
content:
@here

Our new feedback and bug report system is now live! 

We'll be using Discord Forums to more efficiently take in your feedback and bug reports.

We know it's imperative to be open to feedback and we believe this system allows us to do that effectively. To start, only server boosters can create new posts in the forum to keep them clean and easy to moderate, however, everyone can upvote and comment on a bug or feedback.

If you'd like to give us feedback or submit a bug report for the team to look at, please go to the ⁠📝┃forum-guidelines channel to learn more on how to best do that.
